title: Key Derivation, HKDF, and Key Separation · Guided Systems Studio
summary: A product-security pair incrementally builds labeled key schedule and derivation tree, changes one attacker-controlled input, and keeps earlier Go, accessibility, secret-lifecycle, testing, and evidence invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of labeled key schedule and derivation tree while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules.
Apply HKDF extract and expand with supported hashes, salt, labeled info, bounded output, and one-way key schedule ownership.
Derive independent role, direction, epoch, algorithm, and purpose keys from a versioned hierarchy without key cycles.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Kdf Purpose
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop cryptographic engineering team handles case 6468 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive bounded purpose- and role-separated HKDF keys bound to the negotiated transcript; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Kdf Purpose.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Kdf Purpose, keep Crypto Go Kdf Purpose connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
